ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the overall score calculation */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold score for the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "sustainability_report" TEXT /* URL to the company's sustainability report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the company's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being scored */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being scored */,
  "input_score" REAL /* Input score provided by the company */,
  "calculated_score" REAL /* Calculated score based on the input score and metric weight */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned based on the calculated score */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was assessed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the score */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the score has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was verified */,
  "verification_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_scores_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_scores_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_scores_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical score record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being scored */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being scored */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the score was recorded */,
  "input_score" REAL /* Input score provided by the company */,
  "calculated_score" REAL /* Calculated score based on the input score and metric weight */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned based on the calculated score */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was assessed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the score */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the score has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was verified */,
  "verification_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_score_history_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_scores" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark score */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being benchmarked */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for which the benchmark score is applicable */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score for the metric within the industry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the benchmark score is applicable */,
  "benchmark_category" TEXT /* Category of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_scores_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the recommendation is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the resource is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the resource can be accessed */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., company representative, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the user during the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
